stepAnswer: A parameter is a fixed property of the population; a statistic is random because it is calculated from a random sample
stepTitle: A) Warm Up: What is the difference between a parameter and a statistic? Which of the two is random?
choices: Both are fixed constants derived from the population
A parameter is random because it changes with each sample; a statistic is fixed for a given population
A parameter is a fixed property of the population; a statistic is random because it is calculated from a random sample
